discussion_posts.name: stevePerry36
discussion_posts.content: These problems should try to teach and/or exercise useful techniques. This does the neither. If anything, it does the opposite.

discussion_posts.name: EXLsunshine
discussion_posts.content: I found that almost all solutions are either push time complexity is O(n) every time, or pop time complexity is  O(n) every time.\n\nI wunder is there a faster solution that requires less time complexity in average?

discussion_posts.name: jl4930
discussion_posts.content: Too Simple, A little bit naive.

discussion_posts.name: Ebad1001
discussion_posts.content: ##### This can be done in two ways :\n- one where `push()` takes O(1) time & `pop()` takes O(N) time\n- one where `push()` takes O(N) time & `pop()` takes O(1) time
